Article.ArticleTitle: Lineage plasticity: a new dilemma in lung cancer treatment.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Conflict of interest: The authors have no relevant financial or non-financial interests to disclose. Patient consent for publication: Not applicable. Ethics approval and consent to participate: This is a review study. The Ethics Committee has confirmed that no ethical approval is required.
